name: Onion Shortcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Saute onion in butter in a large skillet over medium heat until tender; set aside.
3. Combine egg, milk, and corn; add muffin mix and stir just until moistened.
4. Pour into lightly greased 8-inch square baking dish.
5. Combine reserved onion mixture, hot sauce, sour cream, salt, dill weed, and half of the cheese; spread evenly over batter.
6. Bake for 25 minutes; sprinkle with remaining cheese and bake an additional 5 minutes.
7. Serves 8-10.
